titleStmt.title: SII 30.238: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 238. (A.R. No. 589 of 1915.) Dārukāpuram, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Madhyasthanātha temple-on the second gōpura: right side Jat. Kulasēkhara-Pāṇḍya: Year 13+6, Makara, 25, Sunday, Mrigaśirsha: 1208 A.D., Sunday, Jan. 18

summary.p: It records the gift of 2 achchu, for a lamp with stand to Uḍaiyār Piṇakkaṟukkundēvar of Malaiyaḍikkuṟichchi, a southern hamlet of Sri Parāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Āri-nāḍu by Karinambi Kūttāḍuvāṉ alias Uttama Pāṇḍya Viḷupparayaṉ of Poṉpaṟṟi in Miḷalaik-kūṟṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrī kulai cekaratevaṟ(k)ku yāṇṭu patiṉmuṉṟāvatiṉ E
tir Āṟāmāṇṭu makara nāyaṟṟu Irupattañcān tiyatiyum nāyiṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mṛgaśirṣattu Ārināṭ
ṭu śrīparāntaka caturvvedimaṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai malaiyaṭikkuṟicciyil Uṭaiyār piṇakkaṟukkun tevaṟ(k)ku miḻalai
kkūṟṟattu poṉpaṟṟiyuṭaiyāṉ karinampi kūttāṭuvāṉāṉa Uttamapāṇṭiya viḻupparayaṉ Iṉṉāḷ
mutal cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka Iṭṭa tirununtā viḷakku Oṉṟu Ittirunun=tāviḷakkoṉṟukku civabrā
hmaṇar polivuṭṭāka kaikkoṇṭa Accu 2 Ittirunun=tāviḷakku Erikka Iṭṭa nilaiviḷakku Oṉṟināl Iṭai Aimpatu .
Digital edition of SII 30.238 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
